name: Old Grimbold
dialogue: I've lived in these caves longer than the stones remember...

offers.description: Offers a health potion for 10 crumbs
Warns of a trap ahead

name: Dusty Pete
dialogue: Welcome, welcome! Fine wares for fine adventurers!

offers.description: Sells a buff scroll for 15 crumbs
Buys your junk for 5 crumbs

name: Terri the Trapped
dialogue: Please! I've been stuck here for days. Help me and I'll share what I know!

offers.description: Free them: +2 LCK for 5 rooms, -5 crumbs
Walk away: gain nothing

name: The Whispering Shade
dialogue: I remember when these halls were filled with light... will you hear my tale?

offers.description: Listen to the tale: +3 DEF for 3 rooms
Answer a riddle for a reward

name: Sir Gaius the Eternal
dialogue: Only the worthy may pass. Prove your strength!

offers.description: Duel the guardian: risk HP for loot
Pay respects: 8 crumbs for a blessing

name: Moranna the Bone Collector
dialogue: Beautiful bones you have... I could make you something with them.

offers.description: Buy a bone charm for 12 crumbs
Reveals the boss weakness

name: Elderleaf
dialogue: The forest speaks to those who listen. Let me tend your wounds.

offers.description: Full heal for 20 crumbs
Nature's blessing: +2 all stats for 3 rooms (free)

name: Glimwick
dialogue: Tee-hee! Want to play a game? Answer right and I'll grant a wish!

offers.description: Answer a riddle: win crumbs or lose HP
Buy fairy dust for 7 crumbs (+SPD)

name: Brynn Oakshield
dialogue: The paths ahead are treacherous. I've mapped the safe routes.

offers.description: Reveals map of upcoming rooms
Hire as guide: 15 crumbs, avoid next trap

name: Pyraxis
dialogue: The flames bend to my will! Perhaps I can teach you their secrets.

offers.description: Fire enchantment: +5 ATK for 4 rooms, 18 crumbs
Walk through fire: risk 10 HP for permanent +2 ATK

name: Forgeclaw
dialogue: Hmph. Your gear looks pitiful. Let me fix that.

offers.description: Reinforce armor: +3 DEF for 6 rooms, 12 crumbs
Sharpen weapons: +2 ATK for 6 rooms, 10 crumbs

name: Charred Kael
dialogue: I was the last of my party... don't make the same mistakes we did.

offers.description: Shares boss strategy
Gives his last potion for 3 crumbs
Accept void power: +8 ATK but -3 DEF permanently
Refuse the gift: safe but no reward

name: The Last Seer
dialogue: The end is not what you think. Let me show you the threads of fate.

offers.description: A prophecy: reveals all room types ahead
Fate's blessing: +4 LCK for 5 rooms, 25 crumbs

name: Silq the Shadow Broker
dialogue: Everything has a price in the abyss. What can you afford to lose?

offers.description: Shadow cloak: +6 SPD for 4 rooms, 20 crumbs
Cursed treasure: great loot but -2 all stats for dungeon

name: The Riddlemaster
dialogue: Answer me this, adventurer, and fortune shall be yours!

offers.description: Answer correctly: +15 crumbs. Wrong: -5 crumbs
